scenarios.realWorldBasis: Great Barrier Reef marine heatwave bleaching event, shallow reef flat

scenarios.realWorldBasis: SAR11 clade cultivation from oligotrophic seawater via extinction dilution in low-nutrient media

scenarios.realWorldBasis: First-order agricultural stream, southern Germany; AOB vs AOA nitrification kinetics

scenarios.realWorldBasis: Tara Oceans metagenomics: epipelagic vs mesopelagic vertical stratification driven by temperature

scenarios.realWorldBasis: Eastern tropical Pacific oxygen minimum zone
